items.summary_en: China’s lack of state-backed investment in domestic large language model firms is being addressed through a landmark funding round where the National Integrated Circuit Industry Investment Fund led a $45B valuation jump for DeepSeek, with Tencent and the founder also participating. This first
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek估值短期内飙升至450亿美元，由国家大基金领投，标志着国家队首次公开投资本土大模型公司。这一融资举动将AI大模型正式纳入“半导体国家战略”，明确传递国家全力支持国产AI发展的信号，对行业格局具有战略转折意义。
items.title_zh: 国家队领投DeepSeek估值飙升至450亿美元

items.title: 让 AI 检查软件卡顿问题，Qt 推出智能体代码分析技能
items.summary_en: Qt推出的QML分析器AI智能体技能，解决了2D Qt Quick应用程序中渲染、逻辑和内存导致的卡顿与帧率下降等性能问题。其关键方法是利用AI自动诊断代码并生成性能瓶颈报告，已在多个主流大模型和开发环境中验证有效性。这一工具将繁琐的性能分析委托给AI，有望显著提升开发者定位和解决界面卡顿问题的效率。
items.summary_zh: Qt 推出 QML 分析器技能，让 AI 智能体自动诊断 2D Qt Quick 应用的渲染、逻辑与内存卡顿问题，生成性能瓶颈报告。该技能通过将性能分析委托给大模型，能高效定位界面卡顿或帧率下降的根因，已与主流 AI 编程环境集成，显著提升了 Qt 开发者排查性能问题的效率。
items.title_zh: 让 AI 检查软件卡顿问题，Qt 推出智能体代码分析技能

items.title: 这个创造了Claude Code的男人Boris Cherny大神，完整公开了自己的工作流，并直播演示了一半的编码工作在手机上完成🤪
items.summary_en: Boris Cherny tackles efficient AI-assisted coding by sharing a counterintuitive workflow that prioritizes always using the most capable (and expensive) models for initial planning, maintaining a shared plain‑text knowledge base to give Claude persistent memory of past errors, and letting the model inspect its own code execution. The approach enables highly productive development, with half the coding demonstrated live on a phone, and shows how these practices reduce wasted tokens and iteration cycles.
items.summary_zh: Boris Cherny 提出的 AI 编码工作流旨在解决低效试错与记忆丢失难题，核心在于始终使用最昂贵模型进行一次性清晰规划、用纯文本知识库持续记录每次错误形成“长期记忆”，并强制 AI 实时查看自身代码的执行结果。这套反直觉方法通过在手机上并行运行多个实例实现高效自动修改，对提升 AI 辅助开发的可靠性与产出效率具有重要参考价值。
items.title_zh: 这个创造了Claude Code的男人Boris Cherny大神，完整公开了自己的工作流，并直播演示了一半的编码工作在手机上完成🤪

items.title: 开发者整合Canvas库实现Markdown编辑器内多图拼接
items.summary_en: This solution tackles the cumbersome process of stitching multiple images for tutorials, which previously required external tools like Figma. By integrating an HTML5 Canvas library into a Markdown editor, users can now combine images directly within the editor and insert or export the result. The code has been open-sourced on GitHub, streamlining tutorial creation workflows.
items.summary_zh: 该工作针对教程写作中借助 Figma 等工具拼接多张图片流程繁琐的问题，通过在 Markdown 编辑器中集成 HTML5 Canvas 库，实现了编辑器内直接拼接图片并插入文章或导出。这一改进让图片拼接与写作无缝衔接，显著简化内容创作流程，且相关代码已开源，便于复用。
items.title_zh: 开发者整合Canvas库实现Markdown编辑器内多图拼接

items.title: PayPal 启动 AI 转型自救，拟裁员两成并精简业务架构
items.summary_en: PayPal is tackling stalled growth and a sharp stock decline by launching an AI-driven restructuring that will cut 20% of its workforce and streamline operations into three segments. The key approach is to modernize technology, shift to cloud-native architecture, and embed AI across the business to boost development efficiency and shorten product cycles. This matters because the company aims to save at least $1.5 billion in costs over two to three years while regaining competitiveness in a market where its valuation has fallen over 80% since its 2021 peak.
items.summary_zh: PayPal 正面临增长停滞和股价大跌，为此启动一场以人工智能为核心的转型自救，计划通过裁员约两成并精简业务架构来应对困境。核心方法是向云原生架构迁移、全面推行 AI 应用，以提升开发效率、缩短产品周期，并预计在未来两到三年节省至少 15 亿美元成本。这表明传统金融科技巨头正借助生成式 AI 进行深度组织变革与降本增效，以求在激烈竞争中重获增长动力。
items.title_zh: PayPal 启动 AI 转型自救，拟裁员两成并精简业务架构

items.title: 代理商现在可以创建 Cloudflare 账户、购买域名并进行部署
items.summary_en: Cloudflare addresses the fragmented workflow that agency partners previously faced by integrating account creation, domain purchasing, and service deployment into a single streamlined process. This new capability eliminates administrative friction, giving partners greater
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 为代理商合作伙伴推出一体化功能，解决此前账户创建、域名注册与部署需多步骤操作的低效问题。该方法将三项流程整合到单一界面，显著简化管理并提升代理商的自主性。这一举措有助于加速服务交付、增强合作伙伴关系，并扩大 Cloudflare 的生态系统覆盖范围。
items.title_zh: 代理商现在可以创建 Cloudflare 账户、购买域名并进行部署

items.title: Warp团队开源15个内部工作流加速工具"Oz Skills"
items.summary_en: Warp’s open-sourcing of its “Oz Skills” toolset addresses fragmented developer workflows by providing 15 purpose-built accelerators across Git/GitHub collaboration, data standardization, web quality audits, infrastructure best practices, and general productivity. The key approach is designing these tools as cohesive workflow enablers rather than superficial API wrappers, reflecting internal practices that streamline repetitive tasks. This release matters because it shares proven efficiency gains with the open-source community, lowering friction in everyday development and operations work.
items.summary_zh: Warp团队开源了15个内部工作流加速工具“Oz Skills”，解决开发者日常在Git协作、数据分析、Web审计、基础设施规范及通用生产力等方面的效率瓶颈。这些工具以“构建工作流”而非简单API封装为核心设计，通过自动化和标准化提升团队实践。此举将内部验证的效率经验开放给开源社区，有助于推动开发工作流优化的共享与复用。
items.title_zh: Warp团队开源15个内部工作流加速工具"Oz Skills"

items.title: QwenLM/qwen-code: Release v0.15.8-nightly.20260508.0491252b2
items.summary_en: This nightly release adds an opt-in mechanism for including sensitive span attributes in telemetry data, allowing users to share fine-grained debugging information voluntarily. The feature helps balance detailed tracing for AI/ML performance analysis with privacy, ensuring that potentially confidential data is only exposed with explicit consent. This matters for researchers who need
items.summary_zh: 此版本为 QwenLM/qwen-code 的遥测功能引入了敏感跨度属性的用户可选加入机制，允许按需收集更详细的请求链路数据，从而帮助开发者更精准地诊断性能或行为问题。该更新在默认保护用户隐私的前提下，强化了可观测性与调试能力，对提升工具可靠性和用户信任有重要意义。
items.title_en: QwenLM/qwen-code: Release v0.15.8-nightly.20260508.0491252b2

items.title: QwenLM/qwen-code: Release v0.15.8
items.summary_en: This release addresses two issues: a restrictive symlink policy within skills directories and a missing light theme option for HTML exports. It enables symlinks pointing outside the skills directory and adds a light theme with a toggle to the `/export` HTML feature. These changes improve developer flexibility and user experience when generating and customizing exported web content.
items.summary_zh: 该版本修复了技能目录中符号链接指向外部路径的限制，增强了文件组织灵活性；同时为HTML导出页面新增亮色主题与切换功能，改善了可视化体验；此外改进了SDK端到端测试，确保工具控制逻辑严格遵循“先读后执行”策略，提升代码可靠性。
items.title_en: QwenLM/qwen-code: Release v0.15.8
